final:
module top_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [3:0] count
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 0;
    end
    else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
